base_prompt: Ultra-realistic premium fashion catalog photo of a natural adult woman wearing the garment. Direct eye contact, realistic skin texture, natural body proportions, standing pose, full garment clearly visible, clean premium indoor composition, soft natural daylight. Preserve exact garment geometry, texture continuity, and construction details. Garment identity anchor: ruana_wrap, draped silhouette, open front opening, cocoon hem behavior, cape_like sleeve architecture. Catalog-ready minimal styling with the garment as the hero piece. Keep accessories subtle and secondary to the garment. Build new styling independent from the reference person's lower-body look, footwear, and props unless explicitly requested.

results.prompt: Keep the garment exactly the same: same knit or crochet texture continuity, same stitch pattern and fiber relief, same pattern placement and stripe scale, same open-front ruana construction, same draped cocoon silhouette, same rounded cocoon hem behavior, same cape-like arm coverage, and upper-thigh length. Replace the model with a clearly different adult Brazilian woman with medium-brown skin, long natural curly hair, subtle makeup, and a calm confident expression. Create the image in the style of a top-performing Mercado Livre Brasil fashion listing: bright neutral indoor apartment setting, white walls, pale floor, large windows, clean daylight, straightforward commercial readability, minimal decor, premium but conversion-focused. Use a standing frontal pose with full garment visibility. Change the inner top to a clean white crew-neck tee. Keep the image highly photorealistic, premium e-commerce catalog quality, natural skin texture, and strong product clarity.

evaluation.summary: The edit successfully preserves the garment's complex knit texture and striped pattern while completely transforming the model identity and innerwear as requested. The transition from the base image to the final output shows a clear shift in model ethnicity and hair type, and the environment is updated to a clean, commercial studio look suitable for a high-end fashion listing.

The transition from the stage-1 base to the final catalog-style image is seamless and professional.
